item.title: 2025 Thanksgiving will be different
item.description: Yesterday, I lost my brother. He was only 35. What hurts the most is not just losing him now, but feeling like I lost him 20 years ago to addiction. For decades, I waited for him to hit rock bottom, to come back, to rebuild his life. But now I know that day will never come. To those who only knew him in his years of struggle, I’m so sorry you never got to know the amazing person he was before drugs took over. He was my best friend growing up: captain of the wrestling team, first chair in orchestra, on the football team, full of life, full of promise. He was smart, talented, funny, and kind and I resented being Michael Fairs little sister, feeling like I lived in his shadow. He was everything you could had hoped for in a brother, a son, grandson, and friend, he could have done so much in this world. But addiction stole that from him—and from all of us who loved him. It’s heartbreaking to know that his story will be remembered by many only through the lens of drugs and hardship. I want people to remember the boy who laughed, who was gifted and driven, who was a fun loving menace and who had so much ahead of him. I grieve not only for the brother I lost yesterday, but for the brother I lost 20 years ago when drugs began to take hold. And I grieve for the life he should have had, but never got to live.
item.dc:creator: MissBoof

item.title: After 35 years of being told we were fraternal twins, today we confirmed are in fact identical!
item.description:
Despite looking very similar, my mom has always told us the doctors said we were fraternal twins. We assumed because she had us by C-section that provided the doctors with more certainty which was clearly not the case. For those of you who will say it seems obvious, to be fair, we have an older sister (6 years older) who looks extremely similar to us so we assumed we must carry strong genes.
I read online that roughly 20-30% of identical twins get misidentified as fraternal. So with the chances being so high, there was a good shot we were also misidentified.
Sure enough, our hunch was correct! What’s annoying is now so many people who claimed we look fraternal are telling us it was so obvious that we are identical. But hey, what a cool thing to find out!
item.dc:creator: thatslife6610

item.title: Just make sure Stephen Miller gets invited
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: I built a haunted book nook inspired by NYC subway tunnels.
item.description: I was commissioned New York city's first ever horror centric bookstore that's opening this September. They wanted a nook that could be hidden on the shelves amongst the real books and take the customers by surprise. I suggested using the New York subway as inspiration and they loved that idea. I designed everything in TinkerCAD and printed the parts on my bambulabs P1S, hand painted and weathered all the details. Created some custom graffiti for the walls and created a fake book cover in Photoshop to disguise the piece.
item.dc:creator: LamentConfigurat1on

item.title: The math on trans shooters
item.description: He says in the caption for this video, "I did intend to say “.005” or “.5%” in the video. The math is all correct but sometimes I misspeak." I'm not sure about the thing it talks about donating to at the end, but I thought the math here might be useful for discussions you might find yourself in as people try to act like being trans is a problem due to few trans shooters out of 6000 mass shooters America has had. https://www.instagram.com/staxioms
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: I don’t know where else to go
item.description: My Dad passed away. I am so heartbroken. I am so tired of being strong for everyone. I just want to breakdown somewhere safe. I don’t really have any friends. I haven’t been around here in a long time. But I find myself back here, feeling like it’s the only place where I can let it out. I was the only one with him due to circumstances. I feel guilty that somehow, maybe I should have done more. He died in my arms. I am so fed up with life being so hard. I miss my Dad so much. I didn’t realize before how big a part he was in my life. Why?! My Dad was my best friend and now I feel lost. I just needed to let it out, just a little at least.
item.dc:creator: everblazinglove

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1448 (cowboy movie noise)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
A beautiful afternoon in Pando was had, dressed up in my Bronze-age garb, trying to speak to the trees with the aid of medicinal fungi. Today begins the long journey home. Mostly because I really miss Pippin. If I haul ass I might be able to reach Sedona in time to pick him up from Auntie Roxanne.
I also spent some time in the high plains dressed in my Scythian garb, playing with my bow. Some absolutely fabulous shots were taken by my friend Brianna: I can't believe how awesome these shots are. Seriously look like a fucking Scythian. Eventually, I'll post them here (or in the successor to imgur)
I love grackles.
Fair description of a Great Blue Heron.
SO MANY AMERICAN KESTRELS this trip
I did see a flock of 30 Brewer's Blackbirds in a marshy field with some cows, and my first thought was "Oh so THIS is where they spend the half of the year they're not in the wal-mart parking lot."
New Job starts Tuesday.
I'm still digesting the lessons from the Tree, but one thing that did occur to me in the midst of the journey is this: Everything that humans do is cosplay.
Another big theme of this trip as a whole was "goddamn, I really miss this man, and i'm glad he wrote what he did, and that we have what we have."
Pippin tax! Again, no message from Pippin today, he's not with me, but with luck, messages from Pippin will resume tomorrow. ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #211
item.description: ?️ Normalization moves fast. Nineteen days since the DC takeover, Chicago is next and Boston and Baltimore are already threatened. Texas already gerrymandered its districts, California voters will decide in November whether to follow, and Missouri has jumped into the fray. That’s 109 of 435 House seats already being rigged. They’re banking on exhaustion so move faster than they do, and fight back. And don’t leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist LINKS BELOW 1. The Trump administration plans an Immigration and Customs Enforcement surge in Boston to challenge its sanctuary policies, similar to planned operation in Chicago. 2. Chicago’s police superintendent warns residents that federal rules of engagement differ from CPD policies as Trump plans a National Guard deployment. 3. Missouri’s governor calls a special session to redraw congressional maps mid-decade, drawing praise from Trump and condemnation from Rep. Emanuel Cleaver. 4. Two months after 170 employees dissented over the agency’s scientific policies, the EPA fired eight of them, primarily targeting vulnerable probationary staff. 5. A federal judge freed a D.C. lawyer arrested during the federal surge, calling the case ‘one of the weakest requests for detention I have seen.’ 6. The Trump administration has transferred the final dismantling of USAID from the State Department to budget director Russ Vought two months after the agency’s closure. 7. Defying its UN host agreement, the U.S. has denied visas to Palestinian President Abbas and his delegation to block a French-led statehood vote. 8. A top CDC official revealed after resigning that HHS Secretary RFK Jr. has not received measles, COVID-19, and flu briefings from CDC staff. 9. GAO warns the FAA is risking flight safety, with its aviation meteorologist staffing at a critical low and fewer than half of control centers fully staffed. 10. Days after halting a major New England wind farm, the Trump administration canceled another $679 million for offshore wind projects. 11. A federal appeals court ruled Trump overstepped his authority by imposing tariffs without Congress, but allowed the illegal duties to remain for now. 12. Trump is using a ‘pocket rescission’ to bypass Congress and block $4.9 billion in foreign aid, a maneuver unused for nearly 50 years. 13. Using a procedural loophole, Senate-confirmed Judge Emil Bove continues his Justice Department work instead of taking his seat on the Third Circuit Court of Appeals. 14. Citing a violation of constitutional due process rights, a federal judge has blocked the Trump administration’s nationwide expansion of fast-track deportations. 15. A federal appeals court blocked the Trump administration from ending legal protections for 600,000 Venezuelans, ruling Congress did not grant it that authority. 16. Days after the Justice Dept. said it would not release most Epstein files, Rep. Robert Garcia announced the estate will hand over new documents on September 8, including the book with Trump’s alleged note. 17. The Trump administration will halt the release of 600 Guatemalan children to relatives for a mass removal program it calls ‘repatriation’ but advocates call illegal abandonment. 18. Two northern Virginia school districts serving more than 207,000 students sued the Education Dept. for freezing millions in funds over their transgender student policies. 19. After filing a whistleblower complaint over data security, the Social Security Administration’s top data official was forced out Friday and his resignation email to staff vanished. 20. The Trump administration paused the employee-funded Combined Federal Campaign, a $66 million charity drive that supports nonprofits such as St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital. 21. Trump revoked Secret Service protection for former Vice President Kamala Harris, continuing a pattern of stripping security from political adversaries. 22. The FTC chairman threatened to investigate Google for sending Republican emails to spam, reviving a claim already dismissed by a federal judge and the FEC. 23. After publicly attacking the Smithsonian’s art and calling its chief a ‘rabid partisan,’ Trump held what the White House described as a cordial lunch with him. 24. Weeks after the GSA dropped Elon Musk’s Grok chatbot for producing antisemitic content, the White House has ordered the agency to approve it for government use. 25. House Democrats probe Trump son-in-law Michael Boulos over $100K Saudi wedding deal that appeared to sell access to Trump family. 26. FIGHTING BACK: Video shows Rep. Barry Moore fleeing Alabama town hall after crowd erupts over Trump deportation policies and his claim that non-citizens lack due process. ========================== LINKS Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-boston-chicago-ice 2. https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-police-rules-engagement 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-missouri-map-gerrymandering 4. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-employees-letter-fired 5. https://go.govbrief.today/magistrate-releases-arrested-attorney 6. https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-transitions-usaid-vought 7. https://go.govbrief.today/us-revokes-abbas-visa 8. https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-missed-health-briefings 9. https://go.govbrief.today/gao-nws-critical-stafffing 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cancels-679M-wind 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tariffs-illegal-remain 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-billions-pocket-recission 13. https://go.govbrief.today/bove-still-working-doj 14. https://go.govbrief.today/fast-track-deportation-halted 15. https://go.govbrief.today/tps-venezuela-cancelation-blocked 16. https://go.govbrief.today/garcia-epstein-book-congress 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-children-deportation-guatemala 18. https://go.govbrief.today/va-schools-sue-feds 19. https://go.govbrief.today/ssa-whistleblower-involuntary-resignation 20. https://go.govbrief.today/combined-federal-campaign-paused 21. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cancels-harris-security 22. https://go.govbrief.today/ftc-accuses-gmail-bias 23. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-bunch-smithsonian-lunch 24. https://go.govbrief.today/musk-grok-white-house 25. https://go.govbrief.today/oversight-boulos-probe-access 26. https://go.govbrief.today/lawmaker-heckled-leave-back Love you, Imgur, but do not lose your sh--, errm, get excited. This is a test. It may be repeated. It may be permanent. I dunno. It's a test.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: TheFreePizzaDude is back!
item.description:
15,822 meals sent and we are back for another post! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been amazing and we all love you so goddamn much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,822 meals since we started 1,148 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 250 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 305 5th by Pizza Angel @TapThisBong 340 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by @OP 350 10th by Pizza Angel @PhiliusMaximus 440 11th, 12th, 13th and 14th by @OP 600 15th, 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @pot314 620 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by @OP 650 22nd, Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @pot314 745 26th, 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @jaenen 800 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel pot314 ... Today's Grocery Tally 310 1st by Grocery Angel @testudoaubrei 340 2nd by Grocery Angel @testudoaubrei 400 3rd by Grocery Angel @testudoaubrei 750 4th by Grocery Angel @pot314 ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 30 meals Filled 4 huge grocery orders That's 15,852 meals since we started 1,152 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Crusty
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean does not appreciate her new halloween harness. She eventually shows her displeasure by biting the chair... And then biting mom! Today's Pixie & Brutus, while the next one in the line, it feels a little weird... So I give you kitten shenanigans as a bonus to satisfy your cuteness cravings Getting an extra early post out today. I have to go hunt through my storage locker and try to find some of my classic video game collection to sell off... Which means moving a mountain of random stuff. x.x Wish me luck! Edit: Well that was ... fun. Place I went to is closed for the long weekend, making my entire effort this morning pointless. I could have taken my time instead of rushing. FML
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: It says a lot about you when you automatically see the human body as sexual.
item.description:
Even genitals can be seen as not sexual. Expressions of art, love, and bonding should not be censored.
Banned for posting wiki articles.
This is the most sexual pic I have. And I have a lot of porn.
item.dc:creator: fallibledegenerate

item.title: Apparently, Business Daddy struggles with 50 38.6MB pictures being uploaded at once.
item.description:
So here's 50 images of randomly generated noise. Would have scaled them bigger but then they'd be over the weak 50mb limit.
FYBD

item.dc:creator: GaiusWydra

item.title: A little bitey, but that’s ok
item.description: My cat Madison is usually very aloof and independent, but for some reason she is chilling in my lap. Yes, she seems very interested in biting my thumb but she is also being snuggly so I will overlook it. She is the most beautiful cat I have ever seen. I’m so happy she’s snuggling with me! Forgive me for doing this, but I’m gonna include this on all my posts for a while: Here’s my Bluesky account: https://bsky.app/profile/kittensfordays.bsky.social/post/3lxdobantcc2f And here’s my YouTube account: https://youtube.com/@therealkittensfordays I don’t want Imgur to die, but in case that happens, I want you guys to know where to go to keep up with my kittens. I am absolutely going to keep posting on Imgur, but I am also going to do my level best to be a prolific poster of videos on YouTube and pictures on Bluesky. You guys are just as invested in these kittens as I am. And I will only post new videos and pics on the new platforms! I have enough material, I promise! Oh! AND! @TinyOctopus helped me create an email address so those of you who want to message me or keep in touch when/if Imgur goes down can always contact me! It’s kittensfordays@outlook.com. I don’t want to lose any of the relationships I’ve created here!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
